# Teachers Platinum Credit Card
Sourcing of this Credit Card has been stopped. Existing customers of this card will continue to enjoy the benefits.

## Card Benefits and Features
### Reward Point Benefits
  * 500 Reward Points on Teacher’s Day (05th September) every year.
  * Up to 3X Reward Points on spends of ₹200 with an annual capping of 2,400 Reward Points.


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/teachers-platinum-credit-card "View More")
![Teachers Platinum Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Banking Benefits
  * Up to 3 lifetime free Add-on Credit Cards.
  * Get a 1% fuel surcharge waiver on transactions from ₹400 to ₹5,000. Max waiver: ₹250/cycle.


![Teachers Platinum Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### CashBack Benefits
  * Earn additional CashBack along with the card Reward Points on utility bills, mobile recharges and more via PayZapp
  * Get ₹1,000 CashBack on shopping in-app over 200+ brands via PayZapp


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/teachers-platinum-credit-card "View More")
![Teachers Platinum Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
![ads-block-img](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Know more about the card
  1. ### Card Controls via MyCards
  2. ### Fees and Charges
  3. ### Credit and Safety
  4. ### Renewal Charges
  5. ### More Rewards with PayZapp
  6. ### Most Important Terms and Conditions


###  Card Controls via MyCards 
  * **Single Interface**  
One unified platform for Credit Cards, Debit Cards, Fastag and Consumer Durable Loans
  * **Spends tracking**  
Simple interface to track all your spends
  * **Reward Points**  
View and redeem points at the push of a button


![Card Management and Control](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Fees and Charges 
**Teachers Platinum Credit Card Fees & Charges  
**
  * **Annual charges:** ₹500 plus GST annually.   
Starting from February 15, 2019, with the Teachers Platinum Credit Card, if you spend ₹50,000 annually, you will receive a waiver on the annual fee for the following year.


  * **Interest:** An interest rate of 3.49% per month will be applied to any outstanding balance carried beyond the due date indicated on the bill.   
Effective September 1, 2020, a monthly interest rate of 3.6% (equivalent to an annual rate of 43.2%) will be levied on any unpaid balance remaining beyond the bill's due date. 


[Download(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/teachers-platinum-credit-card/fees-and-charges/pdfs/mitc-1-64.pdf) to know more detailed fees and charges.
[Check now](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/teachers-platinum-credit-card/fees-and-charges) to know more about fees and charges.
![Card Management and Control](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Credit and Safety 
  * Revolving Credit is available at a nominal interest rate (Check the [fees and charges](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/teachers-platinum-credit-card/fees-and-charges) section for more details).
  * Get Up to 50 days of interest-free credit from the date of purchase.
  * The offer is subject to the submission of the charge by the merchant.
  * Stay protected against unauthorised use when you shop anywhere with EMV Chip Card technology.


![Card Management and Control](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Renewal Charges 
  * Membership Renewal Fee: ₹500 plus Applicable Taxes per year
  * With effect from 15th February 2019, on annual spends of ₹50,000 or more, get ₹500 renewal fee waived off on your HDFC Bank Teachers Platinum Credit Card.
  * An interest at the rate of 3.49% will be charged on any outstanding amount carried forward beyond the bill's due date. 
  * With effect from 1st September 2020, interest at the rate of 3.6% will be charged on any outstanding amount carried forward beyond the bill’s due date.


![Renewal Charges](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  More Rewards with PayZapp 
  * Link your HDFC Bank Teachers Platinum Credit Card on PayZapp. 
  * Earn additional CashBack and CashPoints on utility bills, mobile recharges and more.
  * Get ₹1,000 CashBack on shopping in-app over 200+ brands.
  * Securely pay without the hassle of OTPs with ‘Swipe to Pay’.


![Card Management and Control](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)

  * The [Most Important Terms and Conditions(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/teachers-platinum-credit-card/teacher.pdf) for each of our banking offerings features all the specific terms and conditions that govern their use. You must go through it thoroughly to fully understand the terms and conditions applicable to any banking product you choose.


![Make Payments More Rewarding with PayZapp](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)

##  Frequently Asked Questions 
###  How to use the Teachers Platinum Credit Card?
To use the **HDFC Bank Teachers Platinum Credit Card** , simply swipe it at any card-accepting terminal. You can also use it for online transactions. Earn rewards on educational spending and enjoy discounts on partner merchants. Pay bills, check statements, and manage your card online or through the HDFC Bank mobile app.
###  What are the benefits of the Teachers Platinum Credit Card?
The **Teachers Platinum Credit Card** offers various benefits such as reward points on every spend, fuel surcharge waiver, comprehensive insurance protection, and special gifts on Teachers' Day. It also provides access to exclusive offers and privileges curated for teachers.
###  What is the Teachers Platinum Credit Card?
The HDFC Bank **Teachers Platinum Credit** Card is a premium ​​Credit Card designed specifically for teachers, offering exclusive **​​Platinum Card benefits** , rewards, and privileges tailored to their profession. It is a perfect companion for educators looking for **teacher discounts** , **educator perks** , and **classroom supplies rewards**.
###  How to apply for a Teachers Platinum Credit Card?
We are currently not accepting new applications for the HDFC Bank Teachers Platinum Credit Card. However, you can explore a range of other credit cards that may suit your needs. Click [here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards) to view our available options and find the right card for you.
###  Is the Teachers Platinum Credit Card free?
The **Teachers Platinum Credit Card** comes with an annual fee of ₹500 plus GST. However, if you spend ₹50,000 annually, your next year's annual fee will be waived.
